Title: Create Phase 3 growth register
Goal: Define the growth/conversion/trust work before product changes
Acceptance: Register exists with checks and no product-code drift

Title: Sharpen homepage conversion
Goal: Make the homepage clearer and more action-oriented for new buyers and sellers
Acceptance: Hero and primary CTAs explain value within seconds and route users to browse/register/sell

Title: Improve listing card conversion
Goal: Make browse/listing cards feel more premium and decision-ready
Acceptance: Cards show trust/location/price/action cues cleanly on mobile and desktop

Title: Improve zero-state and guided discovery
Goal: Help users find useful listings even when search/filter results are thin
Acceptance: Empty states include suggested categories searches and clear reset paths

Title: Improve seller profile confidence
Goal: Make seller pages feel trustworthy before messaging or purchase
Acceptance: Seller pages show joined date activity listing count and trust/support cues

Title: Improve first-run buyer and seller onboarding
Goal: Reduce uncertainty after signup and guide first useful action
Acceptance: New users see next-step routes for browse sell watchlist messages and profile setup

Title: Expand marketplace landing SEO
Goal: Create stronger category/location landing content without spam
Acceptance: Category/location pages have useful copy metadata and internal links

Title: Add safety education moments
Goal: Make safe payment handover and reporting guidance visible where decisions happen
Acceptance: Listing/order/message surfaces include concise safety cues without blocking flow

Title: Improve help center task routing
Goal: Make support feel complete and easy to act on
Acceptance: Help/support pages route users by issue type with clear contact escalation

Title: Add privacy-safe conversion event plan
Goal: Define measurable conversion events without invasive tracking
Acceptance: Documented event names and safe client/server placement for future analytics

Title: Premium microcopy and consistency sweep
Goal: Remove rough wording and make key flows feel complete
Acceptance: Top public/auth/marketplace routes have consistent CTA language status text and empty states
